name: Grupo Posadas, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Posadas, S.A.B. de C.V. owns, operates, and manages hotels primarily in Mexico. The company operates hotels primarily under the Live Aqua, Grand Fiesta Americana, Fiesta Americana, The Explorean, Fiesta Inn, One Hotels, and Gamma brand names. It also operates Fiesta Americana Vacation Club that sells vacation club memberships, as well as purchases and sells real estate properties in the tourism industry. As of December 30, 2019, the company operated 184 hotels with approximately 29, 851 rooms. Grupo Posadas, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1967 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
